EXPLAIN of the production vector leg (store.vectorLegSQL), recorded per scope.

enable_seqscan is forced off: the 4-note fixture is far below the ~3k-chunk
threshold at which the planner reaches for HNSW unaided, so without the flag
this would record a seqscan and prove nothing about index usage.

What the two scopes show is the point of recording both. Unscoped, the planner
takes the HNSW index and gets approximate neighbours. Scoped to a project it
declines HNSW -- with the index still available -- and instead drives from
notes_project_idx through chunks to the embeddings pkey, sorting exactly. That
is the access-path switch by scope selectivity, and the previous version of this
artifact could not show it: it explained a query with no notes join and no WHERE.

Magnitudes (how much recall the approximate path loses, and where) are measured
in internal/query/retrievaleval on a corpus large enough for the question to be
real. This artifact is the cheap structural check that the shapes are right.

=== scope: unscoped ===
Limit  (cost=12.60..18.21 rows=10 width=200)
  ->  Nested Loop  (cost=12.60..604.04 rows=1054 width=200)
        ->  Nested Loop  (cost=12.46..291.21 rows=1070 width=144)
              ->  Index Scan using embeddings_stub_stub_model_hnsw_idx on embeddings_stub_stub_model e  (cost=12.31..66.72 rows=1070 width=48)
                    Order By: (embedding <=> '[1,0,0,0,0,0,0,0]'::vector)
              ->  Index Scan using chunks_pkey on chunks c  (cost=0.15..0.21 rows=1 width=112)
                    Index Cond: (id = e.chunk_id)
        ->  Index Scan using notes_pkey on notes n  (cost=0.14..0.29 rows=1 width=112)
              Index Cond: (path = c.note_path)
              Filter: ((status IS DISTINCT FROM 'falsified'::text) AND (status <> ALL ('{faded,archived}'::text[])))

=== scope: project=alpha ===
Limit  (cost=34.10..34.13 rows=10 width=200)
  ->  Sort  (cost=34.10..34.13 rows=11 width=200)
        Sort Key: ((e.embedding <=> '[1,0,0,0,0,0,0,0]'::vector))
        ->  Nested Loop  (cost=12.62..33.91 rows=11 width=200)
              ->  Nested Loop  (cost=12.47..32.71 rows=4 width=192)
                    ->  Bitmap Heap Scan on notes n  (cost=8.31..13.66 rows=2 width=112)
                          Recheck Cond: ((project = 'alpha'::text) OR (project = ''::text))
                          Filter: ((status IS DISTINCT FROM 'falsified'::text) AND (status <> ALL ('{faded,archived}'::text[])))
                          ->  BitmapOr  (cost=8.31..8.31 rows=2 width=0)
                                ->  Bitmap Index Scan on notes_project_idx  (cost=0.00..4.15 rows=1 width=0)
                                      Index Cond: (project = 'alpha'::text)
                                ->  Bitmap Index Scan on notes_project_idx  (cost=0.00..4.15 rows=1 width=0)
                                      Index Cond: (project = ''::text)
                    ->  Bitmap Heap Scan on chunks c  (cost=4.16..9.50 rows=2 width=112)
                          Recheck Cond: (note_path = n.path)
                          ->  Bitmap Index Scan on chunks_note_path_ordinal_key  (cost=0.00..4.16 rows=2 width=0)
                                Index Cond: (note_path = n.path)
              ->  Index Scan using embeddings_stub_stub_model_pkey on embeddings_stub_stub_model e  (cost=0.15..0.29 rows=1 width=48)
                    Index Cond: (chunk_id = c.id)
